human_verification.notes: Reviewed the package for government and public-sector policy administration boundaries, official-record discipline, public-program evidence handling, retention/access and privacy escalation, due-process routing, procurement-file boundaries, control evidence coverage, research contract coverage, functionality-map completeness, and validated spec-pack readiness.

review_notes: All required scenario families for the issue, queue brief, and government-and-public-sector research contract are covered and mapped to passing results.
All required functional abilities for shared baseline, records-documentation-and-administration workflow phase, and government-and-public-sector profile are represented and validated.
Runtime remains specification-based and does not claim retained-implementation status.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary controls restrict the lane to government and public-sector policy administration, official record completeness, retention/access posture, control evidence mapping, status notes, and escalation packaging without legal, adjudicative, enforcement, procurement award, public disclosure, privacy determination, or audit-opinion authority drift.

Authority sources cover NARA federal records requirements, FAR procurement contract-file handling, 2 CFR 200 public-program administration and audit procedures, APA due-process boundaries, DOJ FOIA and Privacy Act guidance, DOJ Title VI guidance, and GAO Green Book internal-control standards.

Scenario coverage includes unsupported record changes, missing documents, conflicting systems of record, in-scope administrative handling, adjacent-lane routing, low-confidence missing facts, rights-sensitive exceptions, retention/privacy/access conflict, missing control evidence, policy/practice conflict, adjudication/enforcement refusal, statutory interpretation escalation, tenant adaptation, and terminology normalization.
Runtime remains specification-based with explicit promotion requirements for any later retained-implementation transition.
notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains; jurisdiction, agency policy, public-records, privacy, procurement, due-process, retention, and control-evidence differences are handled through runtime retrieval and escalation rules.
This package is ready for validated operations under specification-based execution controls.
